steps.title: Set up the budget constraint
steps.content:
The business owner is purchasing 81 chairs at price $p$ per chair (before sales tax). After applying a 7% sales tax, the total cost becomes $81p \cdot 1.07$. This total cannot exceed the budget of $\$14,000$:

$$81p \cdot 1.07 \leq 14,000$$

steps.title: Solve for the maximum price per chair
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $81 \cdot 1.07$ to isolate $p$:

$$p \leq \frac{14,000}{81 \cdot 1.07}$$

First, compute the denominator:

$$81 \cdot 1.07 = 86.67$$

Now divide:

$$p \leq \frac{14,000}{86.67} \approx 161.53$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
